item.title: About Us
item.description:
Our Mission

Welcome to PTNews Store, your number one source for the latest world news. We’re dedicated to giving you the very best of journalism, with a focus on reliability, perspective, and real-time updates.

Founded in 2025, PTNews Store has come a long way from its beginnings. When we first started out, our passion for unbiased, aggregated news drove us to build a platform that could offer a comprehensive view of world events. We now serve readers all over the globe and are thrilled that we’re able to turn our passion into our own website.

item.title: Contact Us
item.description:
Get in Touch

We would love to hear from you! Whether you have a question, a news tip, or feedback on our service, please feel free to reach out.

General Inquiries

For all general questions, please email us at: contact@ptnews.store

Press & Media

For all press and media inquiries, please contact our media relations team at: media@ptnews.store

Office Address

PTNews Store Headquarters 123 News Avenue Journalism City, 10101 World

We aim to respond to all inquiries within 24-48 hours. Thank you for your interest in PTNews Store.

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description:
Introduction

Your privacy is important to us. This Privacy Policy explains how PTNews Store (“we”, “us”, or “our”) collects, uses, and discloses information about you. This Privacy Policy applies when you use our website and services.

Information We Collect

We do not collect any personal information from our visitors directly. Our news content is aggregated from various public RSS feeds.

How We Use Information

We do not use any personal information, as we do not collect it. The content on our site is for informational purposes only.

item.title: Trump lists accomplishments, says 'Radical Left Scum' are 'failing badly' in Christmas message
item.description: President Donald Trump delivered contrasting Christmas messages, using one to attack political opponents and the other to focus on faith and Jesus Christ.

item.title: Trump trips, a fake video and 10 possible co-conspirators: Takeaways from new Epstein files
item.description: The largest release of Epstein-related documents yet from the justice department included some notable messages and several mentions of Trump.

item.title: Trump-backed candidate wins in knife-edge Honduran election
item.description: His rival Salvador Nasralla says he will not accept the result, but urges his supporters to remain calm.

item.title: Turkey detains 115 IS suspects 'planning New Year's attacks'
item.description: Turkish authorities say firearms were seized and efforts to trace further suspected members are continuing.

item.title: Turkiye arrests 115 ISIL suspects it says planned holiday attacks
item.description: Raids across Istanbul seize weapons as authorities seek 22 remaining suspects still at large.

item.title: UFO secret files, drone swarms and nuclear-linked sightings stun experts in 2025
item.description: Discover compelling UFO headlines from 2025, featuring new scientific evidence, mysterious underwater objects and government disclosure revelations.

item.title: UK social media campaigners among five denied US visas
item.description: The Trump administration bans five people who have called for tech regulation from entering the country.

item.title: Ukraine accepts demilitarised zone to end Russia war, but do DMZs work?
item.description: The latest proposal involves DMZs in the Donbas and Zaporizhzhia. But DMZs have a mixed track record globally.

item.title: Video: Gaza’s Christians mark first Christmas since fragile ceasefire deal
item.description: Gaza’s Christians reflected on the loss they’ve experienced after two years of Israel’s devastating war.

item.title: Watch: Huge fireball as tanker explodes on Italian motorway
item.description: The vehicle had earlier been involved in a crash and everyone in the surrounding area was safely evacuated before the blast.

item.title: Watch: Moment robbers rip ATM from inside Texas store
item.description: The White Settlement Police Department is searching for two suspects.

item.title: Watch: Pope Leo's plea for peace in Christmas message
item.description: Pope Leo calls for an end to conflicts around the world in Christmas speech.

item.title: Watch: Rescuers find survivor in wreckage of Mexican Navy medical flight
item.description: Footage captures the moment rescuers discover a survivor in the wreckage of a plane crash that killed at least 5 people, with one person still missing.

item.title: Waterskiing Santas and giant cuts of meat: Christmas around the world
item.description: From London to Bethlehem, services and festivities to mark the holiday cheer are in full swing.

item.title: Where is Santa now? Trump answers kids' Christmas calls to Norad tracker
item.description: Norad got some help from President Donald Trump as it marked its 70th year tracking Santa Claus on Christmas Eve.

item.title: Widely prescribed opioid shows minimal pain relief and higher heart risk, study finds
item.description: Study finds widely prescribed opioid painkiller tramadol shows limited effectiveness for chronic pain while increasing risk of serious cardiovascular harm.

item.description: Word of the Week: ‘Wassail’ away your winter blues&nbsp;&nbsp;CNNView Full Coverage on Google News

item.title: World’s largest nativity scene towers over city with record-breaking holy figures
item.description: Spain&apos;s record-breaking nativity scene, featuring a 10-foot Jesus figure, returns to Alicante&apos;s Town Hall Square, drawing visitors from around the world.

item.description: Yemen’s warring parties agree on biggest prisoner exchange deal so far&nbsp;&nbsp;CNNYemen’s Warring Sides Agree to Largest Prisoner Swap in a Decade of Fighting&nbsp;&nbsp;The New York TimesYemen’s sides agree to release 2,900 detainees in war’s largest exchange&nbsp;&nbsp;AP NewsYemen gove...

item.title: YouTube & Google delete accounts of British journalist
item.description: YouTube &amp; Google delete accounts of British journalist

item.title: Zelensky moves towards demilitarised zones in latest peace plan for Ukraine
item.description: On the key question of Ukraine's eastern Donbas, Zelensky says a "free economic zone" is a potential option.

item.title: Christmas spirit returns to Jesus' birthplace after more than two years of war
item.description: Thousands celebrate Christmas in Bethlehem for the first time since the implementation of the U.S.-brokered Israel-Hamas ceasefire agreement.

item.title: Former NBA player Sebastian Telfair recounts jail stint alongside Sean 'Diddy' Combs
item.description: After serving time for a probation violation, former NBA guard Sebastian Telfair reflected on prison time with Sean “Diddy&quot; Combs and shared his outlook on the mogul’s sentence.

item.title: Kate Middleton surprises with piano duet alongside daughter, Princess Charlotte, for Christmas carol service
item.description: Kate Middleton and Princess Charlotte shared a heartwarming piano duet at the &quot;Together at Christmas&quot; carol service, playing &quot;Holm Sound.&quot;

item.title: Late-night joyride ends in disaster as driver smashes into towering Christmas tree on camera
item.description: Wild CCTV footage captures driver&apos;s joyride gone wrong as car crashes into Christmas tree in Kazakhstan square, toppling holiday display before fleeing.

item.title: Lions star Amon-Ra St Brown explains why he isn't fan of playing on Christmas: 'Don't even like it'
item.description: Detroit Lions receiver Amon-Ra St. Brown explained why he isn&apos;t a fan of playing on major holidays like his team will on Christmas Day against the Minnesota Vikings.

item.title: Nearly 20 states sue HHS over declaration to restrict gender transition treatment for minors
item.description: A group of 19 Democrat-led states filed a lawsuit against the Trump administration over a declaration to restrict gender transition treatments for minors.

item.title: Trump-backed candidate Asfura wins Honduras presidential election
item.description: Tito Asfura secured Honduras&apos; presidency, defeating Salvador Nasralla and Rixi Ramona Moncada Godoy in a polarized campaign that shifts Central America&apos;s political landscape.

item.title: Ukraine, US near 20-point peace deal as Putin spurns Zelenskyy Christmas ceasefire offer
item.description: Ukraine and U.S. near finalizing 20-point security framework as Zelenskyy reports 90% agreement on guarantees while Russia pushback signals changes needed.

item.title: Watch: Thieves drag ATM through Texas convenience store in Christmas Eve theft attempt
item.description: Thieves attempted to drag an ATM through a Texas 7-Eleven&apos;s doors using a stolen black SUV and cable on Christmas Eve, but the machine broke free.

item.title: Bukele challenges Hillary Clinton to take El Salvador's entire prison population after criticism
item.description: Bukele challenged Hillary Clinton’s allegations of torture at El Salvador’s CECOT prison, offering to release inmates if other countries accept them.

item.title: Cities across Europe revise Christmas traditions, triggering public backlash
item.description: Brussels faces backlash over modern nativity scene as European cities rethink Christmas traditions amid cultural debates. U.K. museum suggests Santa is &quot;too white.&quot;

item.title: Greta Thunberg arrested supporting Palestinian prisoners on hunger strike during London protest
item.description: Greta Thunberg was arrested and later released on bail after supporting pro-Palestinian activists protesting detentions and a hunger strike in London.

item.title: Guilty verdicts in ISIS plot police say could have been 'the deadliest terrorist attack in UK history'
item.description: Three men convicted of planning alleged gun attacks on Jewish targets in Manchester as British Jews report feeling increasingly unsafe across the U.K.

item.title: Israeli hostages freed, Iran hit, ceasefire held — 2025 shattered idea that US was exiting the Middle East
item.description: Analysis reveals how American force, not retreat, reshaped the Middle East in 2025, from Gaza ceasefire to Iran&apos;s weakened position across the region.

item.title: Jet crash carrying Libya’s top general triggers airspace shutdown over NATO capital
item.description: Turkey shuts down Ankara airspace after business jet carrying Libya&apos;s top military commander crashes. Ali Ahmed Al-Haddad is feared dead.

item.title: Pope Leo XIV says he’s ‘very disappointed’ after Illinois approves assisted suicide law
item.description: Pope Leo XIV and Chicago Cardinal Cupich unsuccessfully urged Illinois Gov. Pritzker not to sign controversial medical aid in dying legislation into law.

item.title: ‘Israel is only the appetizer’: Huckabee warns Iran threat looms as Netanyahu eyes Trump talks
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu seeks meeting with President Donald Trump as officials warn Iranian missile drills could cover surprise attack plans.

item.title: Australia terror attack exposes ISIS resurgence as experts warn of global jihadist networks
item.description: Terror attack in Australia exposes growing jihadist networks as security experts warn ISIS remains far from defeated despite recent government claims.

item.title: Bondi Beach suspects filmed antisemitic video manifesto, Australian investigators say
item.description: Father-son duo accused in Bondi Beach shooting allegedly created antisemitic manifesto with Islamic State ideology, Australian investigators reveal.

item.title: China quietly loads 100+ ICBMs into new missile silos near Mongolia: report
item.description: China has reportedly loaded over 100 new intercontinental ballistic missiles into border silos, accelerating nuclear expansion faster than any other power.

item.title: Israel calls out UN-backed Gaza famine report as biased, ignores aid flow and on-the-ground data
item.description: Israeli officials slam &apos;biased&apos; U.N. food security report on Gaza, citing increased aid deliveries. Analysis reveals disputed famine claims lack evidence.

item.title: Russian general killed by car bomb, third senior military leader killed this year
item.description: Russian Lt. General Fanil Sarvarov killed in Moscow car bombing as investigators suspect Ukrainian intelligence involvement in the deadly attack on Monday.

item.title: Australian PM Albanese gets booed during Bondi Beach vigil honoring Hanukkah attack victims
item.description: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese faced boos at a vigil for Bondi Beach shooting victims Sunday, as some 10,000 mourners gathered to honor those killed.

item.title: Iran executes man convicted of spying for Israeli intelligence
item.description: Iran executed a man convicted of spying for Israel&apos;s Mossad intelligence agency, accused of conducting over 200 spy missions across multiple cities, including Tehran.

item.title: ISIS, Iran escalating global campaign against Jews, Israel spy chief says
item.description: Mossad Director David Barnea said Israel will pursue the Bondi attackers and those who sent them, warning Iran and ISIS are accelerating global plots against Jews.

item.title: Israeli diaspora minister says Australia should have seen 'writing on the wall' before terror attack
item.description: Israel’s Amichai Chikli said Australian officials overlooked rising antisemitism and extremist rhetoric ahead of the Bondi Beach Hanukkah attack, criticizing the focus on gun laws.

item.title: Manhunt underway in South Africa after gunmen open fire at tavern, killing 9 and wounding 10
item.description: Manhunt underway after masked gunmen kill nine people at South African tavern in Bekkersdal township. At least 10 others hospitalized in the attack.
